name: architecture-diagram
description: Evaluate architecture slides — layered systems and context diagrams with restrained connectors and clear zoning
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with clear system boundaries, readable labels, and disciplined connector logic

prompts.text: Build a layered architecture diagram for a modern data platform covering channels, applications, data services, platform services, and governance
Build a system context diagram for a digital underwriting platform showing brokers, underwriters, policy admin, pricing engine, data providers, and regulators around the core system
